data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that substitutes can actually accept or decline offers. This indicates a gap in the current implementation regarding the acceptance workflow requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
